title: RaveDAO (RAVE) Explodes 253% to $9.21, Breaks Into Top 50 Cryptocurrencies
excerpt: RaveDAO token surged an incredible 252.83% in 24 hours, reaching $9.21 and climbing to rank #41 by market capitalization. The dramatic price movement has catapulted RAVE into the spotlight as one of the most significant gainers in the cryptocurrency market today.
